Spiretop Drake.name: 尖顶龙 SpiretopDrake
Spiretop Drake.description:
生命值 29; 重伤 14先攻 +6
AC 16Fort 11Ref 14Will 13
速度 4, 飞行 8 (hover)
属性力量 11 (0)
体质 13 (+1)		敏捷 18 (+4)
智力 3 (null)		感知 16 (+3)
魅力 11 (0)
语言 -
阵营 Unaligned
感官
被动 Perception 13 | Insight 13

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>+6 vs AC; 1d6+4 伤害. </p>]] (⚔) 撕咬 Bite (standard, at-will)

标准动作·随意 [[/roll 1d6+4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>+6 vs AC; 1d6+4 伤害. </p>]]

+6 vs AC；1d6+4伤害。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Snatch</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>+4 vs Reflex; 1 伤害, and the spiretop drake steals a small object from the target, such as a vial, scroll, or coin. </p>]] (⚔) 抢夺 Snatch (standard, at-will)

标准动作·随意

+4 vs Reflex；1伤害，并且尖顶龙从目标身上偷走一个小物件，例如药水瓶、卷轴或硬币。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Flyby Attack</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>The spiretop drake flies up to 8 squares and makes one melee basic attack at any point during that movement. The drake doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when moving away from the target of the attack.</p>]] ⚔ 飞掠攻击 Flyby Flyby Attack (standard, at-will)

尖顶龙飞行最多8格，并在该移动过程中的任意一点进行一次近战基本攻击。龙在离开攻击目标时不会引发借机攻击。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）
